chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No.659 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Examination of Parties/Settlement of Issues 24.10.2024 None present for the Plaitniff Mr. Suleman Hudda Advocate for Defendant No.1/NBP.-.-.-.-.-. On 20.12.2022, Defendant No.1/National Bank of Pakistan filed a statement which reflects that the parties have reached an out of Court settlement and therefore, the suit has become infructuous. On the previous date notice was issued to the plaintiff, who has stopped appearing in this case to come and put forward its objections, if any. None is present on behalf of the Plaintiff even today. In view of the statement filed by the Defendant on 20.12.2022, it seems appropriate to dispose the suit as having become infructuous. Order accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS
